channel.title: wind energy on Gabe Calvo
channel.description: Recent content in wind energy on Gabe Calvo

item.title: Wind Data Analysis Toolbox
item.description: Wind Data Analysis Toolbox I’ve been working on a couple of python libraries that simplify some aspects of wind analysis: WindDataDownloader: simplifies dowloading of MERRA2 and NCDC data. windtools: currently only handing wind rose generation.
